name: LSA Secrets Access - Registry Credential Extraction
description: Detects LSA Secrets extraction from the SECURITY registry hive. Covers reg save, Mimikatz lsadump::secrets, and Impacket secretsdump approaches.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "reg.exe" and process.args : "save" and process.args : "*security*") or (process.args : ("*lsadump::secrets*", "*lsadump::cache*")))
